notes: Lesson 7 Part 40 (154.61s, 6 cues): from the token-ID list to the L x D hidden-state matrix (fetch rows, same-ID-same-row, position divergence, the table, then what refines it). Running example [12,44,91,44]. One review iteration fixed four layout issues: Cue01/Cue02 fetch arrows landed on the 'id NN' row labels (redesigned to vertical ID columns with small-tip arrows aimed left of the labels); Cue04's 'rows = token positions' left label overflowed the safe area (narrower matrix, label moved below); Cue05's output head overlapped the logit bars (respaced the H -> block -> head -> logits pipeline). Per-cue checklist all pass. Final 155.0s vs audio 154.61s (Δ0.32s<0.5).
